series_metadata.series_title: Confidential Personal Information (CPI) System Access Logs
series_metadata.series_description: Manual and electronic logs documenting employee access to confidential personal information (CPI) pursuant to ORC 1347.15 and OAC 109-4-05.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years ; Electronic: 2 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
